note: Live verification of the corrected vmda_query (ExecuteQuery MomentQuest binding) on the demo stand. Host/credentials are env-only and never written here; intrinsic hosts/Server/... UIDs retained per policy.
binding_source: Integration APIs 3.0.pdf, pages 295 and 447 (gRPC API MomentQuest smart search (VMDA))

resolved_binding.query: figure fZone=polygon(0.0,0.0,1.0,0.0,1.0,1.0,0.0,1.0); set r = group[obj=vmda_object] { res = or(fZone((obj.left + obj.right) / 2, obj.bottom)) }; result = r.res;
